message:
Remove unused import and fix React hooks pattern

- Remove unused 'easings' import from enhanced-hero.tsx
- Wrap getSectionMessages in useCallback for proper dependency tracking
- Add getSectionMessages to useMemo dependency array

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
